_note: Club identity. Resolution order per shot: byClubId[clubId] first (a physical club), else byType[clubTypeId] (Garmin's COARSE category — collapses e.g. two wedges into one), else 'unknown'. clubId 0 = no sensor / not selected. retiredClubIds are old clubs no longer in the bag; analysis excludes them.
_verifyWedges: Garmin can't expose loft, so the wedge labels below are PROVISIONAL (ordered by distance). The bag is PW + Vokey 50/54/58, but only TWO active specialty wedges appear in the data (921562502 ~80y, 921562987 ~23y) — the third may be un-sensored or unused. Please set the correct loft for these two clubIds.
